This 2025 Chevrolet 4500 HG LCF Gas is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. This 2025 Chevrolet 4500 HG LCF Gas is finished in Arc White and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1WT

    Convenience

    • Cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; cruise control.

    • Steel wheels are economical and provide proven durability.

    Powertrain and Mechanical

    • Limited slip rear differential

    • Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same? With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.

This 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 3500HD Chassis Work Truck is finished in Summit White and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

  • Deep-Tinted Glass

Preferred Equipment Group 1WT

  • Solar Absorbing Tinted Glass

Snow Plow Prep Package ($530 value)

  • 220 Amp Alternator
  • Skid Plates

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Convenience

  • Remote parking - Fit in anywhere! Remote parking system allows you to pull into or out of a space without having to be in the vehicle; simply use the remote control! It's perfect when the cars next to you are too close for you to be able open your doors. With remote parking, any spot is an open spot!
  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Technology and Telematics

entry.title: 2025 Ford Explorer Platinum
entry.ns0:dealership_address: 2015 E. Main St., Saint Charles, IL 60174
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Ford Explorer Platinum 6.2L Red Line offered in Carbonized Gray will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Lux Leather Package ($1,695 value)

    Ultimate Package ($4,725 value)

      SecuriCode Keyless Entry Keypad ($455 value)

        Safety and Security

        • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
        • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.
        • Hands-off cruise control with lane change - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control with lane change simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up, and helps you make lane changes. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control with lane change.

        Technology and Telematics

        • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
        Other notable features: ENGINE: 3.0L ECOBOOST V6, CARBONIZED GRAY METALLIC, SALT CRYSTAL/ONYX, LEATHER SEATING SURFACES SPORT CAPTAIN CHAIRS Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 630-296-9147 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 2015 E Main St St. Charles IL 60174 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer Certified Pre-Owned and used inventory is offered for sale to the public. entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet St. Charles is a family-owned Chevrolet dealership at 2015 E Main St in St. Charles, Illinois, serving drivers across the Fox River Valley and the western Chicago suburbs - including Geneva, Batavia, South Elgin, Elgin, and Aurora. This 2026 Chevrolet Equinox EV LT1 w/PCY is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Equinox EV LT1 w/PCY is finished in Sterling Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 2LT

    Tech Bronze Package ($3,975 value)

    • Front Fender Decal
    • Black Nameplates
    • Black Bowtie Emblem
    • 21" Tech Bronze Wheels

    All-Weather Liner Package ($395 value)

    • All-Weather Cargo Area Liner
    • Contoured All-Weather Floor Liners

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, PROPULSION, FRONT WHEEL DRIVE, ENGINE, NONE, TRANSMISSION, NONE (ELECTRIC DRIVE UNIT), LT 1, 21" TRANSIT WHEEL, TIRES, 275/40R21 ALL-SEASON BLACKWALL, SELF SEALING, STERLING GRAY METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, BLACK, CLOTH SEAT TRIM, LPO, TECH BRONZE PACKAGE, LPO, ALL-WEATHER LINER PACKAGE, LPO, 21" (53.3 CM) TECH BRONZE WHEELS, LPO, BLACK LUG NUT AND WHEEL LOCK KIT, INCLUDES 20 LUG NUTS, 4 LOCKS AND 1 KEY, LPO, WHEEL LUG NUTS, BLACK, LPO, BLACK WHEEL CENTER CAP, LPO, TIRE PRESSURE MONITOR, LPO, CUSTOM MOLDED FRONT AND REAR SPLASH GUARDS, LPO, BLACK NAMEPLATES, LPO, BLACK BOWTIE EMBLEM, LPO, DECAL, FRONT FENDER, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, CONTOURED, LPO, ALL-WEATHER CARGO AREA LINER Want more detail on this Equinox EV, its pricing, or current Chevrolet offers? Reach out to Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options. Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 630-296-9147 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 2015 E Main St St. Charles IL 60174 Napleton Chevrolet St. Charles Online Pricing Disclaimer New vehicle inventory is offered for sale at the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), as set by General Motors and/or General Motors Financial. Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Chevrolet St. Charles advertises its inventory on this website, [www.napletonchevrolet.com](https://www.napletonchevrolet.com), as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on [www.napletonchevrolet.com](https://www.napletonchevrolet.com) represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Chevrolet St. Charles. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on [www.napletonchevrolet.com](https://www.napletonchevrolet.com) will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. entry.title: 2022 Jeep Renegade Latitude
entry.ns0:dealership_address: 2015 E. Main St., Saint Charles, IL 60174
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. No Accidents! One Owner! This 2022 Jeep Renegade Latitude 6.2L Red Line offered in Alpine White Clearcoat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience Group ($1,745 value)

  • 115V Auxiliary Power Outlet
  • 40/20/40 Rear Seat with Trunk Pass-Thru
  • Heated Front Seats
  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Power 2-Way Driver Lumbar Adjust
  • Power Adjust 8-Way Driver Seat
  • Rain Sensitive Windshield Wipers
  • Rear View Auto Dim Mirror
  • Windshield Wiper De-Icer

Quick Order Package 22B

    Convenience

    • Smart device and keyfob engine start control - Phone ahead. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob or your smart device, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, ,thanks to Smart device and Keyfob engine start control.
    • Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.

    Safety and Security

    • Blind spot warning - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. Blind spot warning alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear so you know if you're about to make an unsafe lane change. Replace fear and uncertainty with confidence and safety with blind spot warning.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
    • Voice activated integrated navigation system - A to B made easy! Whether it's an errand or a road trip, the voice activated integrated navigation system will guide you to your destination. No more bulky, impossible-to-fold maps, and no more stopping to ask for directions. Just tell it where you want to go, and the voice activated integrated navigation system shows you the right way.
    Other notable features: ENGINE: 1.3L I4 TURBO MAIR DI W/ESS, TRANSMISSION: 9-SPEED 948TE AUTOMATIC, QUICK ORDER PACKAGE 22B, ALPINE WHITE CLEARCOAT, BLACK, PREMIUM CLOTH BUCKET SEATS, CONVENIENCE GROUP Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 630-296-9147 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 2015 E Main St St. Charles IL 60174 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer Certified Pre-Owned and used inventory is offered for sale to the public. The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Buick Enclave Preferred 6.2L Red Line offered in Cherry Red Tintcoat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1SD

    Floor Liner Package ($450 value)

    • 1st and 2nd Row All-Weather Floor Liners
    • 3rd Row All-Weather Floor Liner
    • Integrated Cargo Liner

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: ENGINE, 2.5L TURBO DOHC SIDI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), CHERRY RED TINTCOAT Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 630-296-9147 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 2015 E Main St St. Charles IL 60174 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer Certified Pre-Owned and used inventory is offered for sale to the public. Pricing indicated as "The Napleton Price" includes all applicable dealer discounts and/or manufacturer's incentives, and does not include any tax, title, doc fee, license, optional equipment costs and/or dealer installed add-on items selected by the customer at the time of sale. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice. Napleton Auto Group utilizes this website, as well as 3rd party websites, to market and advertise our inventory online. All pricing is subject to the availability of that exact vehicle, as indicated by the Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing reflected on this website, www.napleton.autos, represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Auto Group. In the event of a discrepancy in pricing between this website and any 3rd party website, this website will be considered the most current and accurate price and supersedes any and all other advertised prices. While great effort is made to ensure the accuracy of the information on this site, errors do occur, so please verify all information with a Napleton Auto Group Client Advisor.

entry.title: 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer RS
entry.ns0:dealership_address: 2015 E. Main St., Saint Charles, IL 60174
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet St. Charles is a family-owned Chevrolet dealership at 2015 E Main St in St. Charles, Illinois, serving drivers across the Fox River Valley and the western Chicago suburbs - including Geneva, Batavia, South Elgin, Elgin, and Aurora. This 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer RS is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer RS is finished in Iridescent Pearl Tricoat and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.3L I3 TURBO DOHC SIDI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), IRIDESCENT PEARL TRICOAT Want more detail on this Trailblazer, its pricing, or current Chevrolet offers? Reach out to Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options. Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 630-296-9147 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 2015 E Main St St. Charles IL 60174 Napleton Chevrolet St. Charles Online Pricing Disclaimer New vehicle inventory is offered for sale at the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), as set by General Motors and/or General Motors Financial. Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Chevrolet St. Charles advertises its inventory on this website, [www.napletonchevrolet.com](https://www.napletonchevrolet.com), as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on [www.napletonchevrolet.com](https://www.napletonchevrolet.com) represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Chevrolet St. Charles. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on [www.napletonchevrolet.com](https://www.napletonchevrolet.com) will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. While every effort is made to ensure the accuracy of the information on this site, errors may occur. Please verify all information with a Napleton Chevrolet St. Charles Client Advisor. You may do so by contacting us directly or visiting the dealership.

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

    Safety and Security

    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

  • 2 USB Ports

  • Ultrasonic Front and Rear Park Assist
  • OnStar and GMC Connected Services Capable
  • In-Vehicle Trailering System App
  • LED Cargo Area Lighting
  • Rear Cross Traffic Braking
  • Universal Home Remote
  • Steering Wheel Audio Controls
  • Rear Pedestrian Detection
  • Trailer Side Blind Zone Alert
  • Bose Premium Series with 12- Speaker System
  • Theft Deterrent System (unauthorized Entry)
  • HD Surround Vision
  • Multicolor 15" Diagonal Head-Up Display
  • Bed View Camera
  • Chrome Recovery Hooks
  • Wi-Fi Hotspot Capable
  • Denali Premium Suspension with Adaptive Ride Control
  • Trailering Package

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.
  • Super Cruise hands-on cruise control with lane change

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 6.2L ECOTEC3 V8, TRANSMISSION, 10-SPEED AUTOMATIC WITH ELECTRONIC PRECISION SHIFT, ELECTRONICALLY CONTROLLED, GVWR, 7100 LBS. Quick Order Package 27L

    Comfort

    • Stow 'n Go manual fold-into-floor folding second-row seats
    • Heated steering wheel - A warm touch. Trying to drive with bulky winter gloves on isn't always easy. Keep your hands warm in cold temperatures so you can ditch the mitts and get a firm grip with this heated steering wheel.

    Convenience

    • Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate.
    • Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.

    Safety and Security

    • Blind spot warning - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. Blind spot warning alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear so you know if you're about to make an unsafe lane change. Replace fear and uncertainty with confidence and safety with blind spot warning.

We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2023 Hyundai Tucson SEL 6.2L Red Line offered in Shimmering Silver will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead. It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again. Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot.

    Safety and Security

    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    Other notable features: OPTION GROUP 01, SHIMMERING SILVER, BLACK, STAIN & ODOR RESISTANT CLOTH SEAT TRIM, REAR BUMPER APPLIQUE, FRONT AND REAR MUDGUARDS, CARPETED FLOOR MATS, CARGO NET, CARGO TRAY, FIRST AID KIT Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Preferred Equipment Group 1SL

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    Other notable features: ENGINE, 2.0L TURBO, 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, TRANSMISSION, 9-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.47 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 20" (50.8 CM) ALUMINUM WITH DARK FINISH, TIRES, P245/45R20 ALL-SEASON, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, EBONY SEATS, PERFORATED LEATHER-APPOINTED SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, 10.2" DIAGONAL BUICK INFOTAINMENT SYSTEM WITH NAVIGATION, TECHNOLOGY PACKAGE I, SPORT TOURING PACKAGE, NOT EQUIPPED WITH LANE CHANGE ALERT WITH SIDE BLIND ZONE ALERT AND REAR CROSS TRAFFIC ALERT, MOONROOF, POWER, PANORAMIC, TILT-SLIDING, ROOF RAILS, BLACK, MOLDINGS, LOWER TRIM/WHEEL ARCH MOLDINGS WITH DARK GLOSS FINISH, DOOR HANDLES, BODY-COLOR, AUDIO SYSTEM FEATURE, BOSE PREMIUM 9-SPEAKER SYSTEM, AUDIO SYSTEM FEATURE, MEMORY CARD RECEPTACLE, HD RADIO, FLOOR MATS, CARPETED FRONT WITH ST LOGO AND REAR, HEAD-UP DISPLAY, UNIVERSAL HOME REMOTE, PEDALS, SPORT ALLOY, CARGO COMPARTMENT COVER, REAR, HD SURROUND VISION, FRONT AND REAR PARK ASSIST, NOT EQUIPPED WITH FRONT AND REAR PARK ASSIST Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. This 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer RS is finished in Mosaic Black Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Safety and Security

  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. This 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer RS is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer RS is finished in Sterling Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience Package ($1,195 value)

  • Single-Zone Automatic Climate Control
  • Inside Rearview Auto-Dimming Mirror
  • Driver and Front Passenger Illuminated Vanity Mirrors

  • Hands Free Power Programmable Liftgate
  • 1 type-A and 1 type-C USB Charging-Only Ports

Driver Confidence Package ($395 value)

  • Rear Park Assist
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
  • Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert

Preferred Equipment Group 1RS

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.3L I3 TURBO DOHC SIDI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), TRANSMISSION, 9-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.17 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 19" (48.3 CM) HIGH GLOSS BLACK MACHINED ALUMINUM, STERLING GRAY METALLIC, MOSAIC BLACK METALLIC TWO-TONE ROOF, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK WITH RED ACCENTS, EVOTEX SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, 11" DIAGONAL HD COLOR TOUCHSCREEN, AM/FM STEREO., CONVENIENCE PACKAGE, DRIVER CONFIDENCE PACKAGE, MECHANICAL JACK WITH TOOLS, TIRE, COMPACT SPARE 16" (40.3 CM), SUNROOF, POWER, DUAL-PANE, PANORAMIC, LPO, FRONT AND REAR SPLASH GUARDS, BLACK, LIFTGATE, POWER PROGRAMMABLE, HANDS FREE WITH LED LOGO PROJECTION, LICENSE PLATE BRACKET, FRONT, POWER OUTLET, 120-VOLT, USB CHARGING-ONLY PORTS, WIRELESS CHARGING, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, FRONT AND REAR, AIR CONDITIONING, SINGLE-ZONE AUTOMATIC CLIMATE CONTROL, SENSOR, CABIN HUMIDITY, MIRROR, INSIDE REARVIEW AUTO-DIMMING, VISORS, DRIVER AND FRONT PASSENGER ILLUMINATED VANITY MIRRORS, COVERED, SLIDING, REAR PARK ASSIST, REAR CROSS TRAFFIC ALERT, LANE CHANGE ALERT WITH SIDE BLIND ZONE ALERT Want more detail on this Trailblazer, its pricing, or current Chevrolet offers? This 2024 Honda CR-V Hybrid Sport Touring 6.2L Red Line offered in Crystal Black Pearl will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Napleton Chevrolet St. Charles is a family-owned Chevrolet dealership at 2015 E Main St in St. Charles, Illinois, serving drivers across the Fox River Valley and the western Chicago suburbs - including Geneva, Batavia, South Elgin, Elgin, and Aurora. This 2027 Chevrolet Bolt LT is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2027 Chevrolet Bolt LT is finished in Sterling Grey Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.title: 2023 Jeep Grand Cherokee Altitude
entry.ns0:dealership_address: 2015 E. Main St., Saint Charles, IL 60174
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. No Accidents! One Owner! This 2023 Jeep Grand Cherokee Altitude 6.2L Red Line offered in Velvet Red Pearlcoat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Quick Order Package 23B Altitude ($4,605 value)

  • 115V Auxiliary Power Outlet
  • Altitude Appearance Package
  • Black Headliner
  • Capri Leatherette/suede Seats
  • Delete Laredo Badge
  • Gloss Black Exterior Accents
  • Heated Front Seats
  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Molded in Color Black/gloss Black Roof Rails
  • Power Liftgate
  • Rain Sensitive Windshield Wipers
  • Remote Start System
  • Secondary Active Grille Shutters
  • Selectable Tire Fill Alert
  • Wireless Charging Pad

Comfort

  • Heated steering wheel - A warm touch. Trying to drive with bulky winter gloves on isn't always easy. Keep your hands warm in cold temperatures so you can ditch the mitts and get a firm grip with this heated steering wheel.

Convenience

  • Smart device and keyfob engine start control - Phone ahead. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob or your smart device, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, ,thanks to Smart device and Keyfob engine start control.
  • Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate.
  • Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.

Safety and Security

  • Blind spot warning - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. Blind spot warning alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear so you know if you're about to make an unsafe lane change. Replace fear and uncertainty with confidence and safety with blind spot warning.
Other notable features: ENGINE: 3.6L V6 24V VVT UPG I W/ESS, TRANSMISSION: 8-SPEED AUTOMATIC 8HP50, QUICK ORDER PACKAGE 23B ALTITUDE, WHEELS: 20" X 8.5" GLOSS BLACK PAINTED ALUMINUM, TIRES: 265/50R20 BSW A/S LRR, VELVET RED PEARLCOAT, GLOBAL BLACK, CAPRI LEATHERETTE/SUEDE SEATS Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area.     Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2022 BMW X3 xDrive30i 6.2L Red Line offered in Phytonic Blue Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
  • Apple CarPlay and Android Auto Compatibility smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: WHEELS: 20" X 8.0" FR & 20" X 9.5" RR M DBL SPOKE, MOCHA, VERNASCA LEATHER UPHOLSTERY, M SPORT PACKAGE 2, PREMIUM PACKAGE 2, PANORAMIC MOONROOF, HEATED FRONT SEATS, HEATED STEERING WHEEL, COMFORT ACCESS KEYLESS ENTRY, ALUMINUM INTERIOR TRIM, LIVE COCKPIT PRO W/NAVIGATION, ADJUSTABLE SEAT WIDTH Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 630-296-9147 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 2015 E Main St St. Charles IL 60174 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer Certified Pre-Owned and used inventory is offered for sale to the public. Pricing indicated as "The Napleton Price" includes all applicable dealer discounts and/or manufacturer's incentives, and does not include any tax, title, doc fee, license, optional equipment costs and/or dealer installed add-on items selected by the customer at the time of sale. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice. Napleton Auto Group utilizes this website, as well as 3rd party websites, to market and advertise our inventory online. All pricing is subject to the availability of that exact vehicle, as indicated by the Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing reflected on this website, www.napleton.autos, represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Auto Group. This 2022 Jeep Grand Cherokee L Limited 6.2L Red Line offered in Bright White Clearcoat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Quick Order Package 22E

    Comfort

    • Heated steering wheel - A warm touch. Trying to drive with bulky winter gloves on isn't always easy. Keep your hands warm in cold temperatures so you can ditch the mitts and get a firm grip with this heated steering wheel.

    Convenience

    • Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate.
    • Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.

    Safety and Security

    • Blind spot warning - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. Blind spot warning alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear so you know if you're about to make an unsafe lane change. Replace fear and uncertainty with confidence and safety with blind spot warning.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

This 2026 Chevrolet Traverse AWD RS is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Traverse AWD RS is finished in Polar White Tricoat and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 2RS

    Floor Liner Package ($425 value)

    • Integrated Cargo Liner
    • 1st and 2nd Row All-Weather Floor Liners
    • 3rd Row All-Weather Floor Liner

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 2.5L TURBO DOHC SIDI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), TRANSMISSION, 8-SPEED AUTOMATIC, WHEELS, 22" (55.9 CM) HIGH GLOSS BLACK PAINTED ALUMINUM, POLAR WHITE TRICOAT, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, RS JET BLACK WITH TORCH RED ACCENTS, PERFORATED LEATHER-APPOINTED SEAT TRIM, LPO, FLOOR LINER PACKAGE, SUNROOF, POWER, DUAL GLASS, PANORAMIC, SLIDING, WITH POWER SUNSHADE, LICENSE PLATE FRONT MOUNTING PACKAGE, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, FIRST AND SECOND ROW, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINER, THIRD ROW, LPO, INTEGRATED CARGO LINER Want more detail on this Traverse, its pricing, or current Chevrolet offers? The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2019 Toyota Highlander XLE 6.2L Red Line offered in Blizzard Pearl will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

All-Weather Floor Liner Package ($269 value)

  • All Weather Floor Liners
  • Cargo Liner

Convenience

  • Distance pacing cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with Distance pacing cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead. Distance pacing cruise control; your ultimate co-pilot.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.
Other notable features: BLIZZARD PEARL, BLACK, LEATHER SEAT TRIM Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2021 Genesis GV80 6.2L Red Line offered in Vik Black will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Advanced Package 02 ($4,350 value)

  • Option Group 02

Option Group 02

    Convenience

    • Remote parking - Fit in anywhere! Remote parking system allows you to pull into or out of a space without having to be in the vehicle; simply use the remote control! It's perfect when the cars next to you are too close for you to be able open your doors. With remote parking, any spot is an open spot!

    Safety and Security

    • Hands-on cruise control with lane change - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control with lane change, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up, and helps you make lane changes. Meet your ultimate co-pilot, hands-on cruise control with lane change.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
    Other notable features: ADVANCED PACKAGE 02, VIK BLACK, BLACK, LEATHER SEATING SURFACES Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. This 2026 Chevrolet Equinox FWD LT is finished in Mosaic Black Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Comfort

  • Ventilated front seats -That's cool. Ventilated front seats provides targeted cool air so you and your passenger can get comfortable quicker in hot weather. Getting comfortable is no sweat when you have ventilated front seats.

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

Safety and Security

It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.

This is a fully-optioned, factory-built T/A Widebody with over $17,000 in factory packages - and only 12,364 miles on the clock. Under the hood: The 6.4L SRT HEMI V8 paired with a 6-speed Tremec manual transmission delivers 485 horsepower the way it was meant to be delivered - by hand. Add a MOPAR Cold Air Intake (factory-installed as part of the T/A Package) and you have a car that pulls hard and sounds right. The Widebody Packages ($11,990 in factory options): Both the 23N and 24N Widebody packages are on this car - that means Brembo 6-piston fixed front calipers, Widebody fender flares, 305/35ZR20 Pirelli performance tires on 20x11 Devil's Rim aluminum wheels, Widebody Competition Suspension, Adaptive Damping Suspension, a flat-bottom steering wheel, and a Performance Shift Indicator. This is the full track-day setup from the factory. T/A Package ($3,995): Illuminated Air-Catcher headlamps, functional hood scoop, Black Satin painted hood, Satin Wrap roof and decklid, T/A bodyside graphics, 392 fender decals, rear black spoiler, and the signature Houndstooth Cloth Performance Seats with a White Face instrument cluster and gloss black trim rings. Rear Seat Delete: This car was optioned without rear seats - keeping weight down and making the cabin purpose-built for performance driving. Harman/Kardon Audio Group ($1,795): 18-speaker premium surround sound system with GreenEdge amp and trunk-mounted subwoofer. Because driving fast shouldn't mean sacrificing sound. Additional highlights: Heated and ventilated front seats, heated flat-bottom steering wheel, red Brembo brake calipers, blind One owner. Low miles. Built the way Dodge intended it - and optioned the way most buyers only wish theirs was. Preferred Equipment Group 1LT

  • Color-Keyed Carpeting Floor Covering

  • Leather-Wrapped Steering Wheel
  • LED Daytime Running Lamps
  • Memory Settings For Driver
  • Remote Start
  • SiriusXM Radio with 360L
  • Universal Home Remote

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

  • Keyless Start Switch
  • Lane Departure Warning and Safety Alert Seat
  • Magnetic Ride Control Suspension Package
  • Memory Settings
  • Passive Entry System
  • Perforated Leather-Appointed Seat Trim
  • Power Folding and Adjustable Heated Outside Mirrors
  • Power Release 2nd Row Bucket Seats
  • Power Tilt and Telescoping Steering Column
  • Power-Adjustable Accelerator and Brake Pedals
  • Rear Cross-Traffic Alert Sensor Indicator
  • Side Blind Zone Alert with Lane Change Alert
  • Single-Speed Active Autotrac Transfer Case
  • Universal Home Remote
  • Wireless Charging

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.
  • Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate.

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.title: 2023 Volkswagen Tiguan SE R-Line Black
entry.ns0:dealership_address: 2015 E. Main St., Saint Charles, IL 60174
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2023 Volkswagen Tiguan SE R-Line Black 6.2L Red Line offered in Deep Black Pearl will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience

  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Wireless App-Connect (w/Apple CarPlay, Android Auto & MirrorLink) smart device wireless mirroring
Other notable features: DEEP BLACK PEARL Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet St. Charles is a family-owned Chevrolet dealership at 2015 E Main St in St. Charles, Illinois, serving drivers across the Fox River Valley and the western Chicago suburbs - including Geneva, Batavia, South Elgin, Elgin, and Aurora. This 2026 Chevrolet Tahoe Z71 is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Tahoe Z71 is finished in Black and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

    Convenience

    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.
